rationale: Ground truth offers no substantive concerns (just an 'lgtm' approval), so both candidates correctly reach APPROVE and recall is near-full for both. Precision separates them: cross-checking cited line numbers against the actual diff hunks shows Y's every citation (api_server.py:754,1017,1157,1248,1286,1329 and test file:2533,2546,2615) is exactly correct, while X's test-file citations (2638,2651,2720) and constructor line (1024 vs actual 1017) are off by ~100 lines, suggesting fabricated specifics despite claiming verification. Y's findings are therefore more grounded and actionable.
